name: Shri Ram College of Commerce (SRCC)
description: Established in 1926, SRCC is India's premier institution for commerce and economics education, known for stellar placements and highly competitive cutoffs.

name: Lady Shri Ram College (LSR)
description: LSR is one of Delhi University's most prestigious women's colleges, known for its commerce, economics, and humanities programs and exceptional academic culture.

name: St. Xavier's College, Mumbai
description: St. Xavier's College Mumbai is a top-tier autonomous institution famous for its rigorous academics and vibrant campus life in South Mumbai's heritage precinct.

name: Christ University
description: Christ University is a private deemed university in Bengaluru, famous for its holistic education, strict discipline, and industry-oriented commerce curriculum.

name: Symbiosis College of Arts and Commerce
description: Symbiosis offers high-quality higher education in commerce, economics, and liberal arts with a multi-cultural campus environment.

name: IIM Ahmedabad
description: IIM Ahmedabad is Asia's top-ranked business school, producing world-class managers and entrepreneurs through its rigorous case-study based curriculum.

name: IIT Delhi
description: IIT Delhi is India's premier engineering institution, renowned globally for cutting-edge research and producing industry leaders in technology.

name: IIT Bombay
description: IIT Bombay is India's top engineering school by QS rankings, known for its stellar research, global alumni network, and vibrant campus life.

name: National Law School of India University (NLSIU)
description: NLSIU Bangalore is the country's top law school, a pioneer in the NLU system, and a launchpad for India's best corporate and constitutional lawyers.

name: AIIMS New Delhi
description: AIIMS New Delhi is India's most prestigious medical institution, offering world-class medical education and research with subsidized fees for all.

name: National Institute of Design (NID)
description: NID Ahmedabad is Asia's top design school, producing world-class designers in product, communication, furniture, and textile design.

name: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT Delhi)
description: NIFT Delhi is the country's leading fashion and textile design school, nurturing India's top designers and fashion entrepreneurs.

name: Delhi Technological University (DTU)
description: DTU is one of Delhi's premier engineering universities with excellent placements in CS, Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering.

name: BITS Pilani
description: BITS Pilani is a globally recognized private university known for its industry connections, dual-degree programs, and exceptional startup ecosystem.

name: VIT University (Vellore)
nearbyAirports: Chennai Airport (130 km), Tirupati Airport (70 km)
description: VIT Vellore is a top private university known for strong engineering programs, international collaborations, and large-scale industry recruitment drives.

name: Jadavpur University
nearbyAirports: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Airport (22 km)
description: Jadavpur University is a top-ranked state university in Kolkata with excellent engineering, sciences, and arts faculties and low tuition fees.

name: IISER Pune
popularCourses: BS-MS Dual Degree (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics)
description: IISER Pune is a premier science research institution focused on breakthrough scientific research and training the next generation of Indian scientists.

name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS)
description: TISS Mumbai is India's premier institution for social sciences, public policy, and human rights, developing leaders in social development and NGO sectors.

name: Manipal Academy of Higher Education
description: Manipal is a comprehensive private university renowned for medicine, engineering, and management programs with strong global collaborations.

name: Amity University Noida
description: Amity University is a large private university offering diverse programs in management, technology, law, and arts with strong industry tie-ups.

name: Mount Carmel College, Bangalore
description: Mount Carmel is one of Bangalore's top women's colleges known for its BCom and BBA programs and vibrant cultural activities.

name: Miranda House (DU)
description: Miranda House is India's top women's college, offering outstanding science and humanities programs in the heart of Delhi University's North Campus.

name: Savitribai Phule Pune University
description: SPPU is Maharashtra's leading teaching university with affiliated colleges spanning multiple disciplines and strong research programs.

name: Anna University
description: Anna University is South India's premier engineering university with strong research output and industry partnerships across Chennai's IT corridor.

name: Banaras Hindu University (BHU)
description: BHU is one of India's oldest and largest residential universities, offering wide-ranging programs with very affordable fees across the arts, sciences, and professional disciplines.

name: University of Toronto
description: U of T is Canada's leading university. The Rotman Commerce program combines business education with arts and sciences, providing superior placements globally.

name: University of British Columbia (UBC)
description: UBC's Sauder School of Business is globally renowned for research and entrepreneurship-oriented business degrees in scenic Vancouver.

name: McGill University
scholarships: Yes (McGill Scholarship and Student Aid Program)
description: McGill University is Canada's most international university, known for elite medical, law, and business programs in bilingual Montreal.

name: University of Waterloo
nearbyAirports: Region of Waterloo International Airport (8 km)
description: University of Waterloo is Canada's tech university, famous for its co-op programs connecting students with top tech companies like Google, Amazon, and Apple.

name: Queen's University
nearbyAirports: Kingston Airport (4 km), Toronto Pearson (250 km)
description: Queen's University's Smith School of Business is one of Canada's premier business schools, known for its tight-knit community and strong Bay Street placements.

name: University of Melbourne
description: Australia's top university, providing a flexible Melbourne Model curriculum with powerful industry tie-ups in the finance hub of Melbourne.

name: University of Sydney
description: The University of Sydney is Australia's oldest university, known for its iconic sandstone campus and elite programs in law, business, and medicine.

name: Monash University
description: Monash University is one of Australia's leading research universities with a large Indian student community and strong industry links in pharmacy, IT, and engineering.

name: Macquarie University
description: Macquarie University has a direct Metro connection and is known for its MFA program, actuarial studies, and strong finance and IT industry connections.

name: London School of Economics (LSE)
description: LSE is a world-class social science university specializing in economics, politics, law, and finance. Located in the heart of London.

name: University of Oxford
description: Oxford is the world's oldest English-speaking university, producing Nobel laureates, Prime Ministers, and business leaders across all disciplines.

name: University of Cambridge
description: Cambridge University is consistently among the world's top 2 universities, known for mathematics, science, and humanities programs of unparalleled depth.

name: Imperial College London
description: Imperial College London is the UK's top STEM university, globally recognized for computing, engineering, medicine, and business analytics.

name: University of Edinburgh
description: The University of Edinburgh is a world-class research university in Scotland's capital, offering excellent programs at a lower cost than London universities.

name: University of Manchester
description: Manchester is the UK's top research university outside Oxford and Cambridge, with stellar programs in accounting, computer science, and medicine.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT)
description: MIT is the world's top university for technology and engineering, producing Nobel laureates and Silicon Valley pioneers in a collaborative, innovation-driven environment.

name: Stanford University
description: Stanford is the engine of Silicon Valley, renowned for entrepreneurship, venture capital culture, and producing the founders of Google, Netflix, and HP.

name: University of Michigan
description: University of Michigan's Ross School of Business is a top-tier MBA program; combined with strong engineering and medicine schools, Michigan is a powerhouse.

name: Carnegie Mellon University (CMU)
description: CMU is America's top-ranked university for Computer Science, AI, and Robotics, with close ties to tech companies and research labs worldwide.

name: Georgia Institute of Technology
description: Georgia Tech is America's top public university for engineering and technology, offering exceptional value with elite placements at lower cost than Ivy League schools.

name: Boston University
description: Boston University is a large research university with strong programs in business, biomedical engineering, communications, and law in the vibrant Boston area.

name: University of Texas at Austin
description: UT Austin's McCombs School of Business and robust CS program, combined with Austin's booming tech scene, make it one of America's top value universities.

name: Technical University of Munich (TUM)
entranceExams: Direct Application + APS Certificate for Indians
description: TUM is Germany's top technical university, offering near-free tuition with world-class engineering and computer science programs and excellent industry connections to BMW, Siemens, etc.

name: Heidelberg University
entranceExams: Direct Application + German Language (or APS for Indians)
nearbyAirports: Frankfurt Airport (80 km), Karlsruhe Airport (50 km)
description: Germany's oldest university, Heidelberg excels in medicine, life sciences, and economics, with strong research programs and extremely affordable tuition.

name: National University of Singapore (NUS)
scholarships: Yes (NUS Global Merit Scholarship, ASEAN Undergraduate Scholarship)
description: NUS is Asia's top-ranked university, combining world-class Asian and Western academic traditions with prime access to Asia-Pacific's booming job market.

name: Nanyang Technological University (NTU)
description: NTU is Singapore's leading technological university with world-class engineering, computing, and business programs and the most beautiful campus in Asia.

name: IIM Bangalore
description: IIM Bangalore is a leading business school, ranked among the world's best, known for its rigorous curriculum and exceptional placements in consulting and banking.

name: IIT Madras
description: IIT Madras is India's top-ranked engineering institute known for its research culture, ocean engineering specialty, and booming startup ecosystem.

name: IIT Kharagpur

name: NALSAR University of Law, Hyderabad
description: NALSAR Hyderabad is India's #2 law school, known for corporate law, constitutional law, and its structured bar review preparation programs.

name: Osmania University
description: Osmania University is a comprehensive state university offering affordable quality education in commerce, arts, science, and law across its large campus.

name: University of Auckland
description: New Zealand's largest university with a city-centre campus, strong commerce and engineering programs, and a pathway to New Zealand PR for graduates.

name: Hansraj College (DU)
description: Hansraj College is one of DU's most competitive colleges, known for its strong BCom and science programs at extremely affordable fees.

name: SP Jain Institute of Management & Research
description: SP Jain is one of India's premier private business schools with a consistent 100% placement record and global footprint across Mumbai, Dubai, Singapore, and Sydney.

name: XLRI Jamshedpur
nearbyAirports: Jharsuguda Airport or Bhubaneswar Airport (via road/train)

name: University of Calcutta
nearbyAirports: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Airport (18 km)
description: University of Calcutta is one of India's oldest and largest universities with extensive affiliations and strong traditions in commerce, law, and sciences.

name: University College London (UCL)
description: UCL is a world-class research university in London with elite programs in economics, law, and medicine, and exceptional diversity with 150+ nationalities.

name: University of Warwick
description: Warwick Business School is one of the UK's most respected business schools offering excellent finance, economics, and management programs at lower cost than London.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
nearbyAirports: Rotterdam The Hague Airport (5 km), Amsterdam Schiphol (65 km)
description: Erasmus University Rotterdam's School of Management is Europe's top business school for economics and finance, known for strong quantitative programs.

name: Deakin University
description: Deakin University offers flexible study options with strong industry partnerships and excellent graduate employability in a more affordable, relaxed city setting.

name: Shaheed Bhagat Singh College (DU)
description: SBS College is one of DU's well-regarded commerce colleges, offering quality education at extremely low cost with convenient metro connectivity.

name: Madras Christian College
description: MCC is one of South India's most prestigious autonomous colleges, known for science, commerce, and humanities programs with a 150-year-old heritage.

name: Trinity College Dublin
scholarships: Yes (TCD Scholarship Award, Global Excellence Scholarship)
description: Trinity College Dublin is Ireland's prestigious university offering EU-affordable tuition for international students in a stunning medieval campus in Dublin city center.

name: Singapore Management University (SMU)
description: SMU is Singapore's business-focused university in the city center, known for its interactive seminar-style learning, strong finance, law, and IS programs.

name: Ferguson College, Pune
description: Ferguson College is one of Pune's oldest and most respected colleges, offering quality science and commerce programs at affordable government fees.

name: Loyola College, Chennai
description: Loyola College is one of South India's most prestigious autonomous colleges, known for its rigorous academics and strong placement record in science and commerce.

name: Lovely Professional University (LPU)
nearbyAirports: Amritsar Airport (65 km), Chandigarh Airport (85 km)
description: LPU is North India's largest private university offering diverse programs with industry exposure, global tie-ups, and strong sports scholarships.

name: Panjab University, Chandigarh
description: Panjab University is one of India's oldest and most reputed state universities, known for law, commerce, and science programs at affordable fees.

name: University of Mysore
description: University of Mysore is a traditional state university with strong liberal arts, commerce, and science programs at some of India's lowest tuition fees.

name: IIT Roorkee
description: IIT Roorkee is India's oldest technical institute, renowned for civil, electrical, and computer engineering and its strong alumni network in infrastructure.

name: National Law University Delhi (NLU Delhi)
description: NLU Delhi is India's third-ranked law school, known for corporate and constitutional law excellence, and its own entrance test AILET.

name: MDI Gurgaon
description: MDI Gurgaon is a top-tier business school in the Gurgaon corporate hub, known for strong connections with MNCs and consistent 100% placement.

name: IIM Calcutta
description: IIM Calcutta is India's third top-ranked business school, with exceptional placements in finance, consulting, and technology sectors.

name: MANIT Bhopal
description: MANIT Bhopal is one of India's top NITs, offering excellent engineering programs with strong core industrial placements at affordable NIT fees.

name: NIT Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy)
description: NIT Trichy is consistently India's #1 NIT, renowned for its outstanding placements in tech and core engineering and a competitive academic environment.

name: Presidency University, Kolkata
description: Presidency University is one of India's most academically prestigious colleges, known for producing Nobel laureates and top scientists in pure sciences.

name: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU)
description: NEHU is the premier university of North-East India, offering quality education with very affordable fees across arts, science, and social sciences.

name: SRM Institute of Science & Technology
description: SRM is one of India's largest private universities with strong placements in tech, a thriving research culture, and a broad range of engineering programs.

name: University of Alberta
description: University of Alberta is one of Canada's top 5 universities, known for petroleum engineering, AI research, and strong health sciences programs in Alberta.

name: Dalhousie University
description: Dalhousie University in Halifax offers quality medicine, law, and computer science programs and is a popular choice for international students seeking Canadian PR.

name: Simon Fraser University (SFU)
scholarships: Yes (SFU International Scholarship, Passport to Education)
description: SFU is a comprehensive university near Vancouver with strong computing, business, and engineering programs and easy access to tech industry jobs.

name: Curtin University
description: Curtin University in Perth is known for mining engineering, accounting, and computing programs, and offers strong industry connections in Western Australia's resource sector.

name: RMIT University
description: RMIT University in Melbourne's city centre offers an outstanding mix of design, business, engineering, and IT programs with direct industry project experience.

name: Queen's University Belfast
description: Queen's University Belfast offers quality UK education at the lowest cost among UK Russell Group universities, with strong law, medicine, and computer science.

name: University of Sheffield
description: Sheffield is a Russell Group university offering excellent engineering and social science programs in one of the UK's most affordable student cities.

name: University of Glasgow
scholarships: Yes (Caledonian Scholarship, Glasgow International Leadership Scholarship)
description: University of Glasgow is a Russell Group university known for medicine, law, and business programs in Scotland's vibrant largest city at lower London costs.

name: Freie Universität Berlin
description: Freie Universität Berlin is a top German research university offering near-free tuition in diverse programs including law, economics, and international business.

name: RWTH Aachen University
scholarships: Yes (DAAD, RWTH Scholarships for International Students)
description: RWTH Aachen is Germany's leading technical university for mechanical and electrical engineering, partnered with automotive giants like BMW and Mercedes.

name: James Cook University Singapore
description: JCU Singapore is the Australian university's Singapore campus, offering accredited degrees in psychology, business, and nursing at moderate tuition fees.

name: Concordia University
description: Concordia University's John Molson School of Business is a highly respected business school in Montreal offering strong accounting, finance, and MBA programs.

name: Victoria University of Wellington
description: Victoria University of Wellington is New Zealand's top law and policy school, offering excellent legal, business, and political science programs in the country's capital.

name: IIT Hyderabad
description: IIT Hyderabad is a newer IIT with a special focus on AI, biomedical engineering, and design, producing highly competitive graduates in Hyderabad's tech ecosystem.

name: IIFT Delhi (Indian Institute of Foreign Trade)

name: University of Johannesburg
description: University of Johannesburg is Africa's most international university, offering affordable degrees in accounting, law, and engineering, popular for its diverse student body.

name: College of Engineering Pune (COEP)
description: COEP is one of Maharashtra's oldest and most prestigious engineering colleges, with strong placements in auto, IT, and manufacturing sectors at government fees.

name: NIFT Mumbai

name: University of Dundee
description: University of Dundee has a world-renowned law school and excellent medicine, computing, and design programs at competitive fees in Scotland.
